nodes.title: EnergyEye - Home sensor that monitors electricity usage of individual appliances. App provides personalized tips to reduce consumption, predicts bills, and gamifies conservation efforts.
PlantPal - Smart plant pot that measures soil moisture, sunlight, and nutrients. App provides care schedules, identifies plant diseases from photos, and connects to a marketplace for plant supplies.

SleepSync - Bedside device that analyzes room temperature, humidity, noise levels, and light. App provides personalized sleep insights, customized soundscapes, and suggests environmental adjustments for optimal rest.
WasteWise - Smart kitchen bin that scans barcodes as you discard items. App builds shopping lists based on consumption patterns, tracks expiration dates, and suggests recipes to minimize food waste.

PetPulse - Collar attachment that monitors pet activity, location, and vital signs. App creates a social network for neighborhood pets, provides behavioral insights, and connects to local vets for telemedicine.
MoodMirror - Smart mirror that captures facial expressions and posture. App tracks emotional patterns over time, suggests personalized well-being activities, and connects to mental health resources.

HydroTrack - Water bottle with embedded sensors that measure consumption, water quality, and hydration needs. App gamifies hydration goals and suggests personalized intake based on activity and weather.
CookCoach - Kitchen scale that identifies ingredients by weight and appearance. App suggests recipe modifications based on available ingredients, dietary restrictions, and skill level.
FitFloor - Pressure-sensitive floor mat that analyzes gait, balance, and workout form. App provides personalized exercise routines, tracks progress, and offers real-time form corrections.
MedMinder - Medication dispenser with biometric verification. App manages prescriptions, provides medication information, tracks adherence, and coordinates refills with pharmacies.
ScentScape - Programmable aroma diffuser that creates custom scent profiles. App lets users design personal fragrances, schedule mood-enhancing scents, and share creations with a community.

TextileTech - Fabric analyzer that identifies materials, quality, and care requirements when shopping. App builds a virtual closet, suggests outfit combinations, and tracks clothing sustainability metrics.
